heading: Payment of interest as condition of loan servicing for borrowers
label: 2008g Payment of interest as condition of loan servicing for borrowers
text: The Secretary may not reschedule or reamortize a loan for a borrower under this chapter who has not requested consideration under unless the borrower pays a portion, as determined by the Secretary, of the interest due on the loan.section 1981d(e) of this title
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title III of , , , known as the Consolidated Farm and Rural Development Act, which is classified principally to this chapter. For complete classification of title III to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 87–12875 Stat. 307section 1921 of this titleAug. 8, 1961
